title: Cozy Leek Stir Fry
description: A comforting and citrusy leek stir fry dish perfect for a cozy evening. This recipe is easy to make and packed with flavor.

ingredients.name: crunchy vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as carrots or bell peppers

instructions: Heat the citrusy oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the leeks and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the crunchy vegetables and cook until they start to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the stir-fry sauce and cozy spices, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with additional citrusy oil and cozy spices, if desired.
